description:
**Milestone:** File Editor UI (Nice-to-Have)

Add @codemirror/merge for split-pane diff view showing staged vs working-tree changes. Add markdown-preview.tsx using react-markdown + remark-gfm + rehype-sanitize, rendered in a split panel when a .md file is open. Create git-detail-panel.tsx showing per-file: last commit hash/message/author, staged/unstaged line counts from enhanced-status, stage/unstage button (calling /api/git/stage-files). Add context menu on file tree nodes: New File, New Folder, Rename, Delete, Copy Path — wired to /api/fs/* routes.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/package.json
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/code-editor.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/markdown-preview.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/git-detail-panel.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/file-tree.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/file-editor-view/file-editor-view.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Diff view shows staged vs unstaged changes side-by-side for modified files
- [ ] Markdown files show live preview panel alongside editor
- [ ] Git detail panel shows last commit info and staged/unstaged line counts
- [ ] Stage/unstage button in git panel calls the stage-files API correctly
- [ ] File tree context menu supports New File, New Folder, Rename, Delete, Copy Path
- [ ] npm run build passes

**Complexity:** medium
title: Diff View + Markdown Preview + Git Detail Panel
